The '''Bacrana Shipyards''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] located in the [[Bacrana system/Legends|Bacrana system]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], eight space docks had been constructed, with more capacity planned so that the shipyards could accommodate up to fifteen [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] as large as [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]. The largest of the docks was [[Bacrana Orbital Spacedock A]].<ref name="FBS" />
